inputs.shares_source: 49,087,346 weighted-average diluted shares FY2026 (10-K filed 2026-06-29; sec_companyfacts WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding)
inputs.fcf_source: [Assumption] Normalized owner cash bridge from FY2026 segment adjusted EBITDA $286.1M (AxS $288.7M + SCDE -$2.6M; 10-K Business Segment Results) less maintenance capital spending ~$40M, cash interest ~$50M on ~$729M long-term debt, normalized cash taxes ~$35M, and stock-based compensation ~$25M not fully in adjusted metrics; spot GAAP operating cash flow was -$78.4M (sec_companyfacts)
inputs.revenue_fy2025_source: FY2025 revenue $820.6M (10-K; legacy AV pre full-year BlueHalo)
inputs.funded_backlog_source: Funded backlog ~$1,183.0M at April 30, 2026; ~85% expected revenue recognition in fiscal 2027 (10-K Item 1)
inputs.cash_source: Cash and cash equivalents $377.3M at April 30, 2026 (sec_companyfacts CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue)
inputs.goodwill_impairment_source: Goodwill impairment ~$241M in Space reporting unit after SCAR program stop-work/termination (10-K FY2026 risk factors and notes)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2026 GAAP operating loss -$311M and diluted EPS -$5.40 reflect $204M intangible amortization, $241M goodwill impairment, and BlueHalo integration costs. Lawrence base uses segment adjusted EBITDA bridged to normalized owner cash, not spot losses.

segments.label: Autonomous Systems (AxS) — Switchblade, UAS, MacCready Works
segments.revenue_source: AxS revenue $1,358.1M FY2026 (10-K Business Segment Results)
segments.notes: Legacy AV plus BlueHalo/ESAero LMS and UAS; Switchblade volume and international demand drive growth

segments.label: Space, Cyber and Directed Energy (SCDE) — BlueHalo
segments.revenue_source: SCDE revenue $618.8M FY2026; segment created on BlueHalo acquisition May 1, 2025 (10-K)
segments.notes: Space/cyber/IAMD portfolio; SCAR impairment signals program risk; margin recovery is integration swing factor

options.label: BlueHalo revenue cross-sell and cost synergy
options.base_terminal_rationale: Synergy modeled in AxS/SCDE segment growth rows, not separate terminal
options.evidence: 10-K AxS revenue +$253.5M product and +$67M service from BlueHalo/ESAero acquisitions FY2026

options.label: SCAR / Space program replacement after termination
options.base_terminal_rationale: Customer terminated SCAR OTA for convenience March 2026; $241M goodwill impairment taken; no base recovery without new contract
options.evidence: 10-K FY2026: stop-work January 2026, termination March 2026; goodwill impairment Space reporting unit

segment_build.corporate_drag_source: [Assumption] Unallocated corporate, integration, and acquisition-related costs above segment adjusted EBITDA bridge to consolidated GAAP operating loss

bear.notes: Defense budget pressure, integration stumbles, further program cancellations, amortization persists; normalized owner cash flat

base.notes: Funded backlog $1.18B with 85% conversion in FY2027; segment adj EBITDA margin holds; integration costs fade

bull.notes: Loitering munitions demand sustained, BlueHalo cross-sell accelerates, SCDE margin inflects positive

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill and intangibles from BlueHalo acquisition are marked; $241M impairment taken on Space unit (10-K)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: SCDE adj EBITDA -$2.6M FY2026; GAAP operating loss -$311M consolidated (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in owner-cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Funded backlog $1,183M at Apr 30, 2026; 85% expected revenue in FY2027 (10-K Item 1)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Operating defense contractor; no holdco-style private marks

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Switchblade LMS demand and BlueHalo portfolio already in AxS/SCDE revenue

stance_proposal.override_reason: BlueHalo integration year: GAAP losses, $729M debt, $241M goodwill impairment; spot owner cash negative; bounded bear not fully proven until synergy evidence

marvin_floor.notes: Computed by marvin_valuation.py --write in cloud refresh

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: FY2026 net loss, negative OCF, and goodwill impairment signal market may be ahead of normalized cash
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Two consecutive quarters of positive GAAP operating income and OCF conversion post-integration
